name: cdktn-provider-features-demo
description: Demo scenarios for published CDK Terrain provider plugin-protocol feature bindings generated from current Terraform/OpenTofu schemas.

scripts.synth:functions-ephemeral: cd examples/functions-ephemeral && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:functions-only: cd examples/functions-only && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:ephemeral-writeonly-secret: cd examples/ephemeral-writeonly-secret && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:mixins-s3: cd examples/mixins-s3 && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:mixins-data-recovery: cd examples/mixins-data-recovery && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:mixins-aspect-instance: cd examples/mixins-aspect-instance && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:l2-kinesis-stream: cd examples/l2-kinesis-stream && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:l2-secretsmanager-secret: cd examples/l2-secretsmanager-secret && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:l2-ec2-cidr-split: cd examples/l2-ec2-cidr-split && pnpm exec cdktn synth
scripts.synth:all: pnpm run synth:functions-only && pnpm run synth:functions-ephemeral && pnpm run synth:ephemeral-writeonly-secret && pnpm run synth:mixins-s3 && pnpm run synth:mixins-data-recovery && pnpm run synth:mixins-aspect-instance && pnpm run synth:l2-kinesis-stream && pnpm run synth:l2-secretsmanager-secret && pnpm run synth:l2-ec2-cidr-split
scripts.plan:all: pnpm run plan:functions-only && pnpm run plan:functions-ephemeral && pnpm run plan:ephemeral-writeonly-secret && pnpm run plan:mixins-s3 && pnpm run plan:mixins-data-recovery && pnpm run plan:mixins-aspect-instance && pnpm run plan:l2-kinesis-stream && pnpm run plan:l2-secretsmanager-secret && pnpm run plan:l2-ec2-cidr-split
scripts.check: pnpm run generate:aws && pnpm run synth:all
